statement: Do not use AGENT-547 for UMX1 because it is already active for F6 pressure planning
rationale: The current board assigns AGENT-547 to a different active task
can_change_when: A later coordinator assigns a different unique ID

statement: Do not edit Fluid in AGENT-548
rationale: The external Fluid board has an in-progress TSWFC2 row claiming the exact target files
can_change_when: The TSWFC2 row completes or releases the files

statement: Positive Q_W means heat into the UMX reservoir
rationale: Matches the planned reservoir energy update and keeps source sign explicit
can_change_when: Fluid implementer records a different sign convention before coding

statement: Convective reservoir source is hA_W_K times Ta_K minus T_reservoir_K
rationale: This makes heat enter from a hotter setup reservoir/environment and leave to a cooler one
can_change_when: Fluid implementer documents a more specific physical reservoir boundary

rationale: AGENT-544 failed roots and probe behavior; new API needs smoke evidence first
can_change_when: A separate admission row is claimed after accepted roots and score gates pass
Only a new predeclared task may change the grid

statement: Forbid CFD mdot realized CFD wallHeatFlux imposed CFD cooler duty and validation TP/TW at runtime
